name: Sweet Potato Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients.
2. Add shortening and mashed sweet potatoes; mix thoroughly.
3. Knead dough on a floured surface.
4. Cut with a biscuit cutter. You may need more flour as the dough is sticky.
5. Bake in an oven set to 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 to 15 minutes.
